title: abutilon molle var. grandifolium
intro: Abutilon molle var. grandifolium, also known as the flowering maple, is a variety of the Abutilon molle plant species, belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Abutilon molle var. grandifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
